# pangolin_site (Resource)

Manages a Pangolin site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pangolin_site" "example" {
  org_id  = "your-org-id"
  name    = "example-site"
  newt_id = "r35trvxvi6ivchq"
  secret  = var.site_secret
  address = "10.88.1.0"
  type    = "newt"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the site.
- `org_id` (String) The ID of the organization this site belongs to.
- `type` (String) The site type (e.g. "newt").

### Optional

- `address` (String) The network address assigned to this site.
- `newt_id` (String) The Newt client ID for this site.
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) The secret key for the Newt client.
- `subnet` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of the site.
